sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka lampi lauhuai ciang, Hong nai in keima kiang,
ngai aw, ka puk ding hong len aw,
Innpi ah hong kha in maw, Topa.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: hong len aw, hong kai in, Topa aw,
Kei ka gim, kei ka tawl, kei ka bah;
Innpi ah hong kha in maw, Topa.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sunni hong tumta hi, khua hong
Gun gei-ah ka dingkhin, hong len in, hong pi
Innpi ah hong kha in maw, Topa.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khualzin hun bei dek hi, Topa nong pi ding
Nang aa ka hi khinzo, kei kia bek hi nawnlo,
